verses.1: The LORD’s word that came to Micah of Morasheth in the days of Jotham, Ahaz, and Hezekiah, kings of Judah, which he saw concerning Samaria and Jerusalem.
verses.2: Hear, you peoples, all of you!
verses.3: For behold, the LORD comes out of his place,
verses.5: “All this is for the disobedience of Jacob,
verses.6: Therefore I will make Samaria like a rubble heap of the field,
verses.7: All her idols will be beaten to pieces,
verses.8: For this I will lament and wail.
verses.11: Pass on, inhabitant of Shaphir, in nakedness and shame.
verses.12: For the inhabitant of Maroth waits anxiously for good,
verses.13: Harness the chariot to the swift steed, inhabitant of Lachish.
verses.14: Therefore you will give a parting gift to Moresheth Gath.
verses.15: I will yet bring a conqueror to you, inhabitants of Mareshah.
